# Social And Video Distribution Reference

Distribution is review-first: plans and render contracts are public; credentials and live publishing authority are not.

## Social Plans

| Plan | Channels | Canonical URL |

| [social/posts/community-growth-open-source-ai-workflow-automation.json](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-blog/blob/main/social/posts/community-growth-open-source-ai-workflow-automation.json) | linkedin, facebook, github, youtube, packagePages | https://blog.flyto2.com/posts/community-growth-open-source-ai-workflow-automation |

## Reusable Assets

- 7 repository-owned scene templates across 3 packs.
- 1 checksum-pinned licensed stock source entries.
- One owned Flyto2 logo is committed for deterministic local and CI rendering.
- Generated review media stays under ignored `video/dist/`; upload credentials are outside this repository.
